mapper.select:
SELECT id AS "id", disease_code AS "diseaseCode", disease_name AS "diseaseName", diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM disease
( disease_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR disease_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR diseaseicd ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR disease_category ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
OR
( diseaseicd ILIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') OR disease_code ILIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') )
OR
disease_category ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{category}, '%')
LIMIT #{fetchLimit}

SELECT id AS "id", disease_code AS "diseaseCode", disease_name AS "diseaseName", diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM disease WHERE disease_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR disease_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR diseaseicd ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN disease_name ILIKE #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN disease_name ILIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN disease_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, LENGTH(disease_name), disease_name LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id AS "id", disease_code AS "diseaseCode", disease_name AS "diseaseName", diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM disease WHERE diseaseicd ILIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') OR disease_code ILIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY LENGTH(disease_name), disease_name LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id AS "id", disease_code AS "diseaseCode", disease_name AS "diseaseName", diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM disease WHERE disease_category ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY LENGTH(disease_name), disease_name LIMIT #{limit}
